## Lecture 2 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Bill Gates", "B. Linus Torvalds", "C. Tim Berners-Lee", "D. Vint Cerf"]
question = "Question 1: Who is credited with inventing the World Wide Web?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

